revision_note: v0.2.0 after the v1 blind gate read (gate.new12.v1.raw.md, 4/10): v1 had already removed the register violations, anaphoric templating and extraneous narrative; the judge's remaining findings were paraphrase-mirror clauses (the same sense defined twice) and uniform A;B;C clause architecture. v2 filled the mandated word band with differentiae, sense divisions, contrasts and usage notes instead of restatement. v0.3.0 after the v2 read (gate.new12.v2.raw.md, 4/10): fixed the judge's word-level findings (verbless semicolon appendages, circular 'kept for the purpose', padding tails, 'the reader' for 'the user'), cut detached usage-formula sentences to zero and three-item enumerations from seven to three, and widened the shape inventory (parenthetical subject restrictions in the ODE manner, finite second clauses, an exemplifying extension). The set-level regularities that remain - every entry >=2 segments, every entry inflated to the NSM-gloss word band - are the footprint of the frozen L-3/L-4 contract and cannot be authored away; see docs/next/knull-plain-arm-quality.md section 5.
status: SAMPLE for maintainer review - NOT wired into any store or item build; the frozen knull inputs are byte-untouched

authoring_disclosure.fork: F-KN-A option (ii) re-authoring pass: LLM-drafted to the maintainer's lexicographic standard (2026-07-10), linter-checked against the G-1 contract, blind-naturalness-gated
authoring_disclosure.drafting_model_family: Claude family (Fable) - a different vendor and model family from the SmolLM2 host models
authoring_disclosure.register: edited general-dictionary English (genus + differentiae, parallel definitional clauses, ordinary defining vocabulary, Latinate where natural); every clause definitional - no consequence narration, no staged observers, no anaphoric renaming ('the item', 'the creature'), no life-lesson closings
authoring_disclosure.constraints_inherited_from_build: identical to plain-authored.json: own-label LC1 (full label AND headword), +/-25 percent word band vs the NSM gloss, >=2 admissible claim segments (>=15 chars, no double quotes), pairwise + vs-canonical uniqueness, no-verbatim-NSM-line, register ratio >= 0.25, own-gloss Jaccard < 0.5, ASCII only
authoring_disclosure.items: the 10 plain-spotcheck.json concepts plus the two entries the blind GPT-5.6 review rated least natural (ball, sleep)

definitions.hug: an embrace in which the arms are clasped about another person in affection, comfort, or greeting; also, any close encircling hold or pressure, such as that of a garment fitting tight about the body
definitions.dead: (of a person, animal, or plant) no longer alive; having permanently ceased the functions of life
definitions.visible: capable of being seen; perceptible by the eye, whether directly or with the aid of an instrument
definitions.woman: an adult female human being; distinguished from a girl by full growth and maturity, and from a man by the capacity to bear children
definitions.dog: a domesticated carnivorous mammal of the wolf family, noted for its keen scent and its bark, and kept since ancient times as a companion or working animal; the breeds differ widely in size and form
definitions.bookmark: a stored record of the address of a document or web page, saved under a short descriptive title so that the user may return to the material without searching for it again; commonly one of a list maintained within a web browser
definitions.father: a male parent; a man considered in relation to his child or children, whether they are begotten by him or adopted; correspondingly, a male animal considered in relation to its own offspring
definitions.make (X makes Y): to form by putting parts or materials together; to bring into existence, as a craftsman does a chair or a cook a meal
definitions.wrong (of a doable something): (of an act or course of conduct) contrary to morality or to accepted standards; deserving of blame or censure
definitions.begin (happening X begins at time T): to enter upon the first part of an action or process; (of an event or state) to come into being or into operation
definitions.ball: a rounded object employed in games and sports, typically struck, kicked, or thrown; it may be hollow or solid, and its size and weight are fixed by the game in which it is used, ranging from the small hard sphere of golf to the large inflated sphere of football
definitions.sleep: the natural state of rest that recurs in every day or night, in which the eyes close, the muscles relax, and consciousness is suspended; it differs from mere rest in the loss of awareness, and from a swoon or coma in the ease with which it is broken
